name: Peach Slush with Blueberries
recipeIngredient: ripe and sliced – pitted and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the peaches in a single layer on a jellyroll pan and freeze for about 30 to 45 minutes.
2. When frozen, put the peaches in a food processor with the sugar, water, lemon juice, and vanilla. Process until slushy.
3. Add the sour cream while the machine is running and process until smooth.
4. Distribute two-thirds of the blueberries among four wine glasses.
5. Spoon the peach slush over the berries.
6. Scatter the remaining berries on top and add a sprig of mint to each glass.
7. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
